name: anchor-x402
description: Nine x402-paid agent utilities: anchor, screen, attest, decode/tx, resolve/name, price/token, decode/calldata, parse/datetime, intel/wallet. Pay-per-call USDC on Base mainnet.

ANCHOR_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.description: EVM private key (0x-prefixed hex). The wallet pays for x402 calls in USDC on Base mainnet. Fund with USDC before use.
